side_effects.description: Histamine response/skin reaction at SubQ injection site. Resolved ~90% by diluting with more bac water and allowing syringe to warm to room temperature for 20-30 minutes before injection. Slight burning remains.

protocol_notes: Experienced similar injection site histamine response. Mitigation strategy: dilute with more bac water and let syringe warm to room temperature for 20-30 minutes before injecting. Reports 90% reduction in histamine response with this approach.
